description: Phase 4 (auto-load baseline trim) measurement record. Captures before/after token estimates for the per-turn auto-loaded baseline files. Token estimates are chars/4 (OpenAI rule of thumb); they are approximate but sufficient for verifying the ≥30% / ≥20% reduction targets defined in the plan. Re-run the measurement script in plan-contextWindowOptimization.prompt.md (Phase 4 baseline measurement protocol) when AGENTS.md or copilot-instructions.md is materially edited.

AGENTS.md: Setup Commands: collapsed prose blocks; one-liners for clone/install/setup
Build & Validation: kept top npm scripts; pointed to validation-reference URL for the full ~30 scripts
Code Style: replaced full table block with pointer to azure-defaults/SKILL.digest.md
Security Baseline: replaced bullet list with pointer to references/iac-policy-compliance.md
Agent Workflow: kept table; trimmed verbose footer lines
Commit Guidelines: collapsed type table to inline list
.github/copilot-instructions.md: apex-recall section: collapsed multi-paragraph commentary into a single command block
Multi-Step Workflow: removed full duplicate table; pointed to AGENTS.md#agent-workflow + workflow-graph.json
Skills section: simplified to digest-default + minimal-escalation + full-as-debug
Chat Triggers: tightened gh trigger and GitHub MCP block into compact paragraphs
Explore Subagent: kept table; trimmed surrounding prose
agent_prompts: Swept .github/agents/*.agent.md and .github/agents/_subagents/*.agent.md for `Read .github/skills/{X}/SKILL.md` (full); replaced with `SKILL.digest.md` (10 files, 13 references). All 47 skill directories already ship a SKILL.digest.md.
context_shredding_skill: Updated the Skill Loading Tiers table (around line 50) so SKILL.digest.md is the default; SKILL.minimal.md is the >80%-utilization escalation; full SKILL.md is reserved for skill-authoring/debugging.
The Compression Tiers table (around line 20) for artifact loading is unrelated and was NOT touched.
workflow_engine_handoff_digest: Updated 01-orchestrator.agent.md to read the digest by default; full file remains for fallback (gate authoring, debugging).

verification_notes: Re-run via: node -e 'const fs = require("fs"); for (const f of ["AGENTS.md",".github/copilot-instructions.md"]) { const c = fs.readFileSync(f,"utf8"); console.log(f, Math.round(c.length/4), "tokens"); }'
More accurate measurement requires tiktoken (Python) or @dqbd/tiktoken (JS).
Commit a fresh measurement to this file when baseline files are materially edited.
